---
title: "Themes"
---

# About the themes
About this site


:::{.callout-note}
Note that there are five types of callouts, including: 
`note`, `tip`, `warning`, `caution`, and `important`.
:::


![Alt text](media/drone.jpg){fig-align="left"}


:::{.column-page}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

## Lidar 
Text about lidar here. And a better picture. Willow Density Mapping.


![](media/flight.png)

:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](media/flight.png)

## Hyper Speed
Text here about willow gender mapping

:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}

## Bumblebee
Text here about bumblebee?! 

![](media/flight.png)

:::

:::
